chk_ticket_items_override_reason.name: chk_ticket_items_override_reason
chk_ticket_items_override_reason.value: "ticket_items"."override_price" IS NULL OR ("ticket_items"."override_reason" IS NOT NULL AND "ticket_items"."override_reason" <> '')

chk_tickets_client_or_guest.name: chk_tickets_client_or_guest
chk_tickets_client_or_guest.value: "tickets"."client_id" IS NOT NULL OR ("tickets"."guest_name" IS NOT NULL AND "tickets"."guest_name" <> '')
